title: bidens capillifolia
intro: Bidens capillifolia, also known as bidens or hairy beggartick, is a perennial herb belonging to the asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Bidens capillifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
